steps.title: Group the circle terms
steps.content:
Move the $y$ term to the left so the $x$ and $y$ terms can be completed separately.
$$
x^2+10x+y^2=8y+76
$$
$$
x^2+10x+y^2-8y=76
$$

steps.title: Complete both squares
steps.content:
Add $25$ to complete the $x$ square and $16$ to complete the $y$ square.
$$
(x^2+10x+25)+(y^2-8y+16)=76+25+16
$$
$$
(x+5)^2+(y-4)^2=117
$$

steps.title: Read the radius
steps.content: In circle form, the right side is $r^2$. $$ r^2=117 $$ $$ r=\sqrt{117} $$ The answer is C.
